abilities.description: Move a +1/+1 counter from CARDNAME onto target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Move a +1/+1 counter from CARDNAME onto target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: MoveCounter

triggers.description: Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it dies, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.
